subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and utterance, and the quintessence of thanksgiving and exposition, beseemeth and befitteth the most holy and most exalted court of the Lord of all possibility [3.5s]... ...God hath not blinked, nor will He ever blink His eyes at the tyranny of the oppressor
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و بیان و ساذج شکر و تبیان بساط امنع اقدس مالک امکان را لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement
